DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FROM DEFENDANT O'LOUGHLIN RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT O'LOUGHLIN'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT O'LOUGHLIN IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 21, 2009. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel From Defendant O'Loughlin Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant O'Loughlin's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant O'Loughlin in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff to submit proposed order on or before August 21, 2009. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. NOT REPORTED. (RBU/612)
